creator: solon@macaulay.demon.co.uk
text:
The entry for 27 Feb in the calendar.history file says that on this
day Richard the Lionheart (Richard I of England) was crowned. Hardly
the sort of information that everyone needs but my history book says
that he was crowned on 3 September. I'd be interested to know who 
maintains this file.

Fix: 

Edit the file calendar.history
How-To-Repeat: grep Lionheart calendar.history
